gigapan.name: Twisted Upright House
gigapan.description:
The Twisted Upright House is a project of the North Bay Regional Burners. It is one of the CORE projects - Circle of Regional Effigies. These are art pieces created by 34 Regional Burner groups.



There is a cluster of CORE projects scattered around the Man, they are beautiful!



For more on the Twisted Upright House see this facebook page:
http://www.facebook.com/NorthBayCore2012



Or their group:
http://www.facebook.com/groups/272119306206325/



Other GigaPans from Burning Man 2012 are at:
/gigapans?tags=bme2012



And other GigaPans of past years can be found at:
http://gigapan.com/gigapans?tags=bme
